productDisplayName: Fila Men's Striper Pique Polo White Orange Navy T-shirt

Created using a cotton and polyester blend fabric, this tee is designed to keep you fresh and comfortable all day, while the ribbed sleeve hem sits snug on well-toned arms. Team this T-shirt with jeans, stylishly buckled belts and sports shoes for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
